sub_mechanisms: M_1: empirical Lipschitz estimator L̂ over LLM input perturbations
M_2: red-team produces inputs maximizing local Lipschitz violation
M_3: blue-team retrains minimizing L̂ subject to accuracy floor
stripped_llm_application: Estimate worst-case input-to-output sensitivity via Lipschitz constant; coevolve attacker (maximizes L violation) and defender (minimizes L) iteratively; converge to game-theoretic equilibrium with provable L bound.
novelty_claim_stripped: RvB and red-blue iterative games exist but optimize task-specific defense; this candidate uses Lipschitz-constant as the universal robustness objective in coevolution.
